description_long: This is a mid-sized passenger airplane with a streamlined fuselage painted primarily white, accented by a blue and yellow diagonal stripe running from the nose to the tail. The aircraft features a low-wing configuration with straight wings that have red-tipped ends and visible control surfaces. Two jet engines are mounted at the rear of the fuselage, integrated into the tail section, which is designed in a T-tail configuration. The landing gear is extended, showing a tricycle arrangement with two main gear units and a single nose gear. The cockpit is located at the forward end of the fuselage, with multiple windows indicating a multi-seat, enclosed design. The overall appearance suggests a regional jet suitable for short to medium-haul flights.
description: A white regional jet with blue and yellow stripes, low straight wings, rear-mounted twin jet engines, and a T-tail. The airplane has red-tipped wings, extended tricycle landing gear, and a forward, multi-window cockpit.
description_view_0: Front view showing the nose, cockpit windows, and the full wingspan with red-tipped ends.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the blue and yellow stripe, rear-mounted engines, and extended landing gear.
description_view_2: Rear frontal view displaying the T-tail, twin engines, and the symmetry of the wings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same features as view 1, with clear visibility of the tail and landing gear.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with straight wings and red-tipped ends, no visible winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines mounted at the rear fuselage on either side of the tail.
attribute_tail_design: T-tail configuration with a single vertical stabilizer and a high-mounted horizontal stabilizer.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear with two main gear units and a single nose gear, all extended.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with multiple windows, indicating a multi-seat arrangement.
